rules.rule: Public Amazon language must match SITE.amazonAssociatesStatus.
While status is pending, Amazon links must be untagged and must not use sponsored rel.
After approval, links must use the verified tracking tag and nearby paid-link disclosure.
Do not state or imply that Winnie or the editorial team personally tested a product unless documented testing occurred.
Do not state changing retailer prices as fixed facts. Budget pages must be framed as planning targets and require a current cart check.
Every ASIN must be exactly 10 uppercase alphanumeric characters and independently verified before use.
Do not publish star ratings, review counts, availability, Product Offer data, or AggregateRating without a compliant current source.
Generated Winnie images must use generic product categories and must not imply branded hands-on testing.
